sentences.target: Meine Tante kocht heute für uns.

translations.de: Meine Tante kocht heute für uns.
translations.en: My aunt is cooking for us today.
translations.es: Hoy mi tía cocina para nosotros.
translations.fr: Ma tante cuisine pour nous aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi mia zia cucina per noi.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我阿姨给我们做饭。
translations.yue: 今日我阿姨煮嘢畀我哋食。
translations.pt: Hoje minha tia cozinha para nós.
translations.tr: Teyzem bugün bizim için yemek yapıyor.
translations.vi: Hôm nay dì tôi nấu ăn cho chúng tôi.
translations.nl: Vandaag kookt mijn tante voor ons.
translations.uk: Сьогодні моя тітка готує для нас.
translations.hi: आज मेरी मौसी हमारे लिए खाना बना रही है.
translations.pl: Dziś moja ciocia gotuje dla nas.
translations.el: Σήμερα η θεία μου μαγειρεύει για μας.
translations.nb: I dag lager tanten min mat til oss.
translations.id: Hari ini tante saya memasak untuk kami.
translations.sv: I dag lagar min moster mat till oss.
translations.ro: Astăzi mătușa mea gătește pentru noi.
translations.da: I dag laver min tante mad til os.
translations.ja: 今日はおばが私たちのために料理を作っています。

tokens.explanation: Attributive possessive determiner (1st person singular possessor); agrees with a feminine singular nominative noun ('Tante'); determiner of the subject NP.
Common noun, feminine singular; here nominative as the subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; predicates the action.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a beneficiary PP.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural accusative; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Ich rufe später meine Tante an.

translations.de: Ich rufe später meine Tante an.
translations.es: Más tarde llamaré a mi tía.
translations.zh-Hans: 我等会儿给我阿姨打电话。
translations.yue: 我陣間會打電話俾我阿姨。
translations.pt: Mais tarde vou ligar para a minha tia.
translations.vi: Lát nữa tôi sẽ gọi cho dì tôi.
translations.hi: मैं बाद में अपनी मौसी को फोन करूँगा.
translations.el: Θα τηλεφωνήσω στη θεία μου αργότερα.
translations.nb: Jeg ringer til tanten min senere.
translations.id: Nanti saya akan menelepon tante saya.
translations.ro: O să o sun pe mătușa mea mai târziu.
translations.da: Jeg ringer til min tante senere.
translations.ja: 後でおばに電話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular, present indicative; together with the particle 'an' forms the separable verb 'anrufen' (to call by phone).
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.
Attributive possessive determiner (1st person singular possessor); feminine singular accusative agreement with 'Tante' (direct object).
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of the verb.
Separable verbal particle; combines with 'rufe' to form 'anrufen' (separable verb).

sentences.target: Die Kinder besuchen morgen ihre Tante.

translations.de: Die Kinder besuchen morgen ihre Tante.
translations.en: The kids are visiting their aunt tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana los niños van a visitar a su tía.
translations.fr: Demain, les enfants vont rendre visite à leur tante.
translations.it: Domani i bambini vanno a trovare la loro zia.
translations.zh-Hans: 明天孩子们去看他们的阿姨。
translations.yue: 聽日啲小朋友會去探佢哋嘅阿姨。
translations.pt: Amanhã as crianças vão visitar a tia delas.
translations.he: מחר הילדים יבקרו את הדודה שלהם.
translations.vi: Ngày mai bọn trẻ sẽ đến thăm dì của chúng.
translations.nl: Morgen bezoeken de kinderen hun tante.
translations.hu: Holnap a gyerekek meglátogatják a nagynénijüket.
translations.hi: कल बच्चे अपनी मौसी से मिलने जाएंगे.
translations.el: Αύριο τα παιδιά θα επισκεφτούν τη θεία τους.
translations.nb: I morgen skal barna besøke tanten sin.
translations.id: Besok anak-anak akan mengunjungi tante mereka.
translations.sv: I morgon ska barnen hälsa på sin moster.
translations.da: I morgen besøger børnene deres tante.
translations.ja: 明日、子どもたちはおばの家に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner of the subject NP 'Kinder'.
Common noun, plural; nominative subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 3rd person plural, present indicative; transitive verb selecting an accusative object.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.
Attributive possessive determiner (3rd person plural possessor); feminine singular accusative agreement with 'Tante' (direct object).
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of 'besuchen'.

translations.pt: Ele mora com a tia dele.
translations.vi: Anh ấy sống cùng dì của mình.
translations.hi: वह अपनी मौसी के साथ रहता है.
translations.ja: 彼はおばと一緒に暮らしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite intransitive main verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a locative/associative PP.
Attributive possessive determiner (3rd person singular masculine possessor); feminine singular dative agreement with 'Tante'; determiner within the PP object.
Common noun, feminine singular dative; object of the preposition 'bei'.
